title: 20 cm Cute Sitting British English Bulldog Dog Puppy Teddy Soft Plush Beanie Toy
features: This sweet pup would just love to be your new best friend! The 8 inch English Bulldog is covered in super-soft fur with his breed's signature wrinkles. His adorably realistic face is sure to melt your heart!
Realistically detailed using the highest quality plush materials.
Made of soft polyester materials; eyes and nose are plastic.
description: Product Description Bulldog Puppy Dog Teddy Toy This super-soft toy will make a long-lasting cuddly companion for all girls, boys, adults, or pets. It will make a great nursery or children's bedroom decoration. Body Features It has a lovely cute face and its facial detail consists of shiny eyes with a cute nose and tiny ears. This toy is ideal for pretend play it helps to develop a child's imagination, speech, and creativity. This cuddly friend is a great companion for afternoon tea, birthday parties, or walks. The size and lightweight make this plush toy perfect for travel or to bring for holidays. British English Bulldog This sweet pup would just love to be your new best friend! The 8-inch English Bulldog is covered in super-soft fur with his breed's signature wrinkles. His adorably realistic face is sure to melt your heart! Perfect Gift This snuggly cute toy brings warmth and coziness to a child's room and placed on the shelf can be used for decorative purposes. The perfect gift for English Bulldog or dog fans. This soft stuffed toy is fun to cuddle and makes a great gift for any occasion. It will match every soft toy family collection. The video showcases the product in use.
